fields.name: ./tooltipVisible
fields.label: ./tooltipVisible
fields.description: Select the option to display the short description around the component and no tooltip text when a user hovers over the component.

fields.name: ./tooltip
fields.label: Short description
fields.description: Provide the text to display as a tooltip when a user hovers on the field.

fields.name: ./value
fields.label: Value
fields.description: Value of button.

fields.name: ./default
fields.label: Default
fields.description: Default value of button.

fields.name: ./dorColspan
fields.label: Number of columns to use to display the field in a Document of Record
fields.description: It is supported only for column layout in Document of Record.

fields.name: ./icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon identifier for displaying an icon in the button.

fields.name: ./dorBindRef
fields.label: Document of Record bind reference
fields.description: You can specify a Document of Record Bind Reference to link an adaptive form field with a document of record field. When you fill any value in the linked field of an adaptive form, the value is also displayed in the linked field of the corresponding document of a record.

mandatoryProperties../enum: Specify the content to submit, when the option is selected.
Specify the content to submit, when the option is selected.
Specify the content to submit, when the option is selected.
Specify the content to submit, when the option is selected.

mandatoryProperties../type: Selecting the String data type option would increase the upload size by 30%.
Selecting the String data type option would increase the upload size by 30%.

mandatoryProperties../alt: Textual alternative of the meaning or function of the image, for visually impaired readers.
Textual alternative of the meaning or function of the image, for visually impaired readers.

mandatoryProperties../searchRoot: The root page from which to search in. Can be a blueprint master, language master or regular page.

mandatoryProperties../navigationRoot: The root page from which to build the navigation. Can be a blueprint master, language master or regular page.

mandatoryProperties../url: The URL of the content to embed. The URL will be checked against supported processors for a match.
mandatoryProperties../html: The code of the content to embed. The embed code is filtered to remove unsafe tags, such as the script tag.

mandatoryProperties../navigationRoot: The root page of the global language structure.
